calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court rescinds the April 4, 2022, order appointing Administrator Ronnie Robinson. The Court orders the estate administration closed. Status on the filing of the inventory and appraisal is off calendar. The April 10, 2023, status hearing on close of the estate is off calendar. Court to issue order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An order to show cause will be issued to Ronnie Robinson to appear on January 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why the April 4, 2022 order appointing him as the administrator should not be rescinded for failure to have letters issued, and to show why the estate should not be administratively closed on the courts of motion. The order to appear is off calendar. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is also continued to January 9, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Personal Representative Ronnie Robinson to appear on Nov-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the final inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronnie Robinson, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Petitioner that he has no prior experience serving as Administrator of an Estate. The court points Petitioner to what his responsibilities will be if the court appoints him as Administrator and urges Petitioner to seek guidance from a professional to assist him. Mr. Robinson reports that he has found someone to assist him with this matter. After additional discussion, the court confirms that no one has appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Ronnie Robinson is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing the Inventory and Appraisal is set for Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on Close of Estate is set for Apr-10-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To Apr-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
